designConstraints: Single-column focused layout with max content width of 1280px, centered with 24px horizontal margins per layout grid spec
8px spacing unit system — all padding, margin, and gap values must be multiples of 4px/8px from scale [4,8,12,16,24,32,48,64]
Background uses background-primary (deep-navy #0F172A); form sections use surface-primary (navy-surface #1E293B) cards at elevation level 1
AmountHeroInput must use heading-1 typography scale (DM Sans, 24px, weight 700) at minimum, scaled up for hero prominence — large numeric display is a primary visual anchor
CategoryChipGrid chips and PaymentMethodChipRow chips use pill border-radius (9999px) with slate-border (#334155) default state and gold-amber (#F59E0B) selected/active state
NewCategoryInlineForm and ColorPickerRow expand inline within the chip grid — no modal or drawer; uses navy-raised (#293548) surface at elevation level 1
MiniCalendarDropdown renders as an elevation level 2 dropdown (0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)) with z-index 1000, anchored below DatePickerInput
SaveExpenseButton is full-width, uses cta-primary (gold-amber #F59E0B) background with text-on-cta (deep-navy #0F172A), minimum touch target height 44px
QuickAddSuggestions chips appear above the main form as a horizontally scrollable row; each QuickAddChip uses navy-raised surface with gold-amber accent on hover
TopBar and NavigationTabs are shared components — must match exact visual treatment from dashboard and spending-insights pages for consistency
MonthSelector in TopBar is consistent with dashboard implementation; SettingsDialog is a shared drawer overlay at z-index 1200
CharacterCounter for NoteInput displays remaining character count using label typography (DM Mono, 12px) in muted-text (#64748B), turning coral-error (#F87171) at limit
Pre-fill edit mode must visually distinguish itself — TopBar back arrow navigation returns to dashboard; form fields populate from existing Expense data
Focus ring uses gold-amber (#F59E0B) with 2px width and 2px offset on all interactive elements
Disabled state opacity is 0.38 for SaveExpenseButton when required fields (amount, category) are not filled
Motion: form field transitions use fast duration (150ms) with default easing; MiniCalendarDropdown open/close uses normal duration (300ms) with emphasized easing
Desktop-first layout at 1440px viewport; tablet breakpoint at 768px collapses to tighter single-column with reduced horizontal padding
referencePatterns: Hero input pattern — oversized numeric display as primary focal point, consistent with premium fintech dashboard aesthetic
Chip grid selection pattern — multi-select chip grid with active gold-amber border and background tint for selected state, matching CategoryFilterDropdown pattern from dashboard
Inline form expansion pattern — NewCategoryInlineForm expands within the chip grid flow without disrupting layout, using navy-raised surface to visually separate
Horizontal scrollable suggestion row — QuickAddSuggestions as a pill-chip carousel above the form, auto-fill on tap pattern
Full-width CTA button pattern — SaveExpenseButton anchored at bottom of form, consistent with primary action patterns across the app
Dropdown calendar pattern — MiniCalendarDropdown anchored to DatePickerInput trigger, elevation level 2, dismissible on outside click
Shared TopBar pattern — back arrow left-aligned, page title centered, consistent with all three main pages
Shared NavigationTabs pattern — bottom tab bar with Home, Add Expense (active), and Insights tabs; active tab uses gold-amber indicator
Character counter pattern — inline below NoteInput textarea, right-aligned, matches label typography from design token scale
Color picker row pattern — horizontal swatch row within NewCategoryInlineForm using category color tokens for selection
accessibilityRequirements: WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of 4.5:1 minimum for all text — silver-text (#CBD5E1) on deep-navy (#0F172A) achieves ~11:1; gold-amber (#F59E0B) on deep-navy achieves ~8.5:1 for CTA text
AmountHeroInput must have a visible label (visually hidden acceptable) with aria-label='Expense amount' and aria-describedby linking to currency indicator
CategoryChipGrid must use role='radiogroup' with each chip as role='radio' and aria-checked state; keyboard navigable with arrow keys within the group
NewCategoryInlineForm must trap focus within the inline expansion when open; Escape key collapses the form and returns focus to the trigger chip
ColorPickerRow swatches must have aria-label describing the color name and aria-pressed for selected state; minimum 44x44px touch targets per design token spec
DatePickerInput trigger must have aria-haspopup='dialog' and aria-expanded state; MiniCalendarDropdown must use role='dialog' with aria-label='Select date'

MiniCalendarDropdown calendar grid must use role='grid' with role='gridcell' for each day; selected date uses aria-selected='true'; keyboard navigation with arrow keys, Enter to select, Escape to close
PaymentMethodChipRow must use role='radiogroup' with aria-label='Payment method' and each chip as role='radio' with aria-checked
NoteInput must have associated label element and aria-describedby linking to CharacterCounter; CharacterCounter must use aria-live='polite' to announce remaining characters
SaveExpenseButton must have descriptive aria-label distinguishing 'Save Expense' vs 'Update Expense' in edit mode; disabled state uses aria-disabled='true'
QuickAddChip elements must have aria-label describing the suggestion (e.g., 'Quick add: [merchant], [amount]') and be keyboard focusable with Enter/Space to activate
All form fields must have visible focus indicators using gold-amber focus ring (2px solid, 2px offset) meeting WCAG 2.4.7
Error states (e.g., invalid amount, character limit exceeded) must use aria-invalid='true' and aria-describedby pointing to error message text in coral-error (#F87171)
NavigationTabs must use role='tablist' with role='tab' for each tab; active tab has aria-selected='true'; consistent with shared component implementation across all pages
TopBar back arrow button must have aria-label='Go back to Dashboard' and be keyboard accessible
SettingsDialog drawer must use role='dialog' with aria-modal='true', aria-label='Settings', and focus trap when open; Escape key closes the drawer
Screen reader must announce form mode context — 'Add Expense form' vs 'Edit Expense form' — via page heading or aria-live region on navigation
Ensure logical tab order: TopBar → QuickAddSuggestions → AmountHeroInput → CategoryChipGrid → DatePickerInput → PaymentMethodChipRow → NoteInput → SaveExpenseButton → NavigationTabs
dataModelDependencies: Expense entity — fields: id, amount, merchant, category_id, date, payment_method_id, note, currency; used for pre-filling form in edit mode via GET /api/expenses/:id and submitting via POST /api/expenses or PUT /api/expenses/:id

Category entity — fields: id, name, color_token, color_hex, icon, is_default, sort_order; used to populate CategoryChipGrid and NewCategoryInlineForm color selection via GET /api/categories and POST /api/categories
PaymentMethod entity — fields: id, name, type, icon, last_four, is_default; used to populate PaymentMethodChipRow via GET /api/payment-methods
QuickAddSuggestion entity — fields: id, merchant, amount, category_id, payment_method_id, emoji, frequency, last_used_at; used to populate QuickAddSuggestions row via GET /api/suggestions?limit=4
UserSettings entity — fields: currency, locale; used to display correct currency symbol in AmountHeroInput and format numeric display via GET /api/settings
